ground_truth.title: How to Draw Headphones: Easy Step-by-Step Art Lesson for Kids
ground_truth.author: Kathleen Barbro
ground_truth.main_content: Here you’ll find an easy step-by-step tutorial video for how to draw a Headphones with Headphones Coloring Page. Drawing of Pair of Headphones. If you like music and you like to draw, then learning how to draw headphones might come in handy. You could draw them on a person, or a self portrait too. Just start with any of the many self portrait projects found on this site and add colorful headset like the sample shown here. You’ll have a drawing that includes these aids for listening to music, which pretty much define our modern times. Use the button below to get this easy PDF Tutorial! Headphones Coloring Page. Materials: Colored Pencils or Crayons. A larger pack will offer more color choices. Sharpie Markers Black. A permanent marker will give you a dark black color. Pencils. I like how this brand always makes nice dark lines. Drawing Paper. This is the good stuff you can buy in bulk for a good price. Note: All of the links shared here are affiliate links. Step by Step Directions. Time needed: 45 minutes. Draw a Headphone Step by Step. 1. Draw a wide upside down curve. 2. Make another smaller curve inside. 3. Draw a smaller curve inside. 4. Start the earpiece on the right. 5. Draw a matching shape on the left. 6. Add matching inside shapes. 7. Draw cap shapes on the outside. 8. Finish with even smaller cap shapes. 9. Trace with a marker and color. More Fun Misc Projects.
